---
title: 'New directions: Use of vehicle position information provides a novel tool for emissions inventory development'
date: '2002-01-01'
author:
- S.D. Beevers
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## New directions: Use of vehicle position information provides a novel tool for emissions inventory development

<p class="pub-meta">S.D. Beevers, D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2002


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2002-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
